name: opencode-distributed-delegation
description: Distributed delegation plugin for OpenCode — Titan orchestrator with parallel Myrmidons

scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --outdir=dist --external:@opencode-ai/plugin --external:@opencode-ai/plugin/* --external:@opencode-ai/sdk --external:@opencode-ai/sdk/* --external:zod --metafile=dist/meta.json && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
